follow_ups.title: Evaluate Qwen3-ASR 1.7B after the 0.6B path is proven locally
follow_ups.reason: The 1.7B model is expected to improve quality but has higher download, memory, and runtime cost.

follow_ups.title: Investigate Qwen3-ASR streaming runtime after file-level quality is measured
follow_ups.reason: Official streaming support is vLLM-based and may not be practical on the local Mac CPU/MPS path.
